results.description: Baseline with full verbose skill (295 lines SKILL.md + forms.md, reference.md, LICENSE.txt, 8 scripts)

Streamlined SKILL.md to ~75 lines focused on pdfplumber extraction and reportlab creation. Removed forms.md, reference.md, LICENSE.txt, and scripts/ directory (all unused by tasks). Added structured table-to-data example.

changes: Condensed SKILL.md from 295 to ~75 lines, focusing on extraction (pdfplumber) and creation (reportlab)
Removed forms.md (form-filling not needed by tasks)
Removed scripts/ directory (8 Python utility scripts not needed)
Added table-to-structured-data example for extraction tasks
Added reportlab Table with TableStyle example for creation tasks
